<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Application info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/app/info"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns application metadata including engine version, platform info,
compiled features, and loaded mods. Designed as a one-shot bootstrap
endpoint for MCP servers and SDK consumers.


<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./get-info.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
